Intraday post (23/Sept)

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

The positioning is a heavily upside-skewed short fly centering around 6689.99The net speed profile is net negative, favoring for gamma increase as day passes, net positive charm flows, and less resistance to the upside than to the downside.The implied distribution expects 68.52% more upside than downside, probability-wise. The centroid range in very supportive in the 6669.21 - 6679.83 area. The net long color (gamma decay) makes it even more supportive as day passes.Upside vol of vol is heavily sold.

The most sticky zone is the 6700 zone. After the first 40 mins it starts to create a floor with margin of error of 6713, from where reversion is possible.

Downside pivot is 6673.83seems unbreakable during the powerhour, provoding reversion opportunity. Primal downside target, if it moves down is 6650/60 zone, this tests the skew if they net sell the puts or keep bidding. Ultimate downside target would be 6614.49, then pin to 6635.Downside pivot is also sticky during the powerhour, if spot is under 6680However, the main bet is ranging around the center of the fly: 6690/6700 zone. And secondary is to spike up to 6713. then revert back. And market barely bets on any downside. This positioning makes me feel, market is anxieous about what Powell will say and what the coming datas will be. There is a worry about inflation, and they want to pin the spot. High theta today. I wouldn’t bet on directions. Just collect premiums. If I would do, I’d use futures.
